subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is imprisoned unto him who hath been guided by the guidance of his Lord and was among the beneficent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی استهدی بهدایه ربه و کان من المحسنین عند
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for protection, @power of prayer, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
